title: On Torture: A Public Singer
content:
Torture will give a dozen pence or more
    To keep a drab from bawling at his door.
    The public taste is quite a different thing
    Torture is positively paid to sing.
meaning:
Hilaire Belloc's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "On Torture: A Public Singer"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
